data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for revocation/expiry controls per biz grant.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Revocation/expiry controls per biz grant', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case outlines the need for revocation controls, yet the prior steps do not include any specific checks or validations related to revocation or expiry of grants. Therefore, the evidence does not support a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of revocation/expiry controls per biz grant.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the revocation/expiry controls.
